response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which aligns with the agentic-workflow focus of the role. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI delivery, Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, and cloud-platform AI systems — all core requirements. Worth a screening call to probe the depth of recent AI work, but not a clear staff-level GenAI match on paper.
strengths: Long tenure shipping production systems across web, backend, and embedded domains
Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, mentoring) fits customer-facing staff IC role
concerns: No Python listed in skills; primary AI-ecosystem language is missing
No evidence of RAG, vector databases, or LLM evaluation/observability work
Limited demonstrated cloud-AI delivery on AWS/GCP/Azure beyond general AWS CDK usage at Optilyz

key_factors.factor: Missing Python and core GenAI stack (RAG, vector DBs)
Recent MCP and agentic workflow experience
Senior full-stack tenure with craftsmanship and mentoring
